arts.ttl: Liverpool hierarchy discussed hiring Premier League manager before Arne Slot
arts.sum: The Liverpool board reportedly discussed a leading Premier League manager before ultimately deciding to hire Arne Slot last summer. Slot has proven a great appointment for the Reds, with the Dutch tactician taking to the top of the Premier League table and the top of the league phase of the Champions League. arts.sum: Michael Oliver has been the subject of conversation following Liverpool's 2-2 draw with Everton at Goodison Park on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Reds ready to spend whatever it takes to sign PSG star Warren Zaire-Emery
arts.sum: Liverpool are prepared to spend whatever it takes to sign Warren Zaire-Emery from PSG, FootballTransfers in conjunction with AnfieldWatch understands. Liverpool are keeping tabs on the situation of Warren Zaire-Emery, PSG’s 18-year-old midfield star.

arts.sum: The Reds go into the weekend seven points clear of Arsenal with 14 games to go.

arts.ttl: Why Arne Slot Will be in Dugout For Liverpool vs Wolves Despite FA Charge
arts.sum: Arne Slot is set to be in the dugout against Wolves on Sunday despite the Liverpool manager being charged by the FA for his conduct against Everton.
